description.ko: 고대 문자처럼 보이는 지질학적 층의 익스트림 매크로 샷으로, 암석과 퇴적물의 거칠고 흙 같은 질감을 강조합니다.
description.en: An extreme macro of geological layers that look like ancient writing, emphasizing the rough, earthy textures of stone and sediment.

prompt: Hyper-realistic top-down satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Tectonic Parchment.' A macro perspective of a deep canyon where #8B4513 sienna and #D2691E ochre sedimentary layers reveal millions of years of geological history. Deep #2F4F4F slate mineral veins cut through the rock like frozen lightning, while sharp #F4A460 sand drifts fill the ancient crevices. Tactile texture showing grain-level detail, cinematic natural lighting with long shadows, 8k resolution, emphasizing the raw narrative of the earth.
